dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The system successfully executed the rules-context-loader with valid schema validation, rectifying the JSON parsing failure observed in the baseline. This ensured that governance context was properly ingested for the subsequent alignment steps.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: Deep causal analysis is indicated by the high volume of processed tokens (117,619) and the successful mapping of work to evolution, showing a robust chain of logic from requirements to architectural intent.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The progression through the alignment-engine and intent-generator suggests the system effectively surfaced and navigated trade-offs between governance rules and architectural evolution goals.
